_notes: URLs sourced from https://github.com/probe-rs/probe-rs/releases.  probe-rs ships single-file binaries (`archive_kind: bin`) for every host except Windows where the asset is .zip-wrapped.  The udev_rules string is the canonical Linux ruleset shipped in the probe-rs release tarball — content reproduced verbatim so we don't need a second download for the rules.

tools.udev_rules:
# Bulk-replace udev rules for probe-rs.  Place at /etc/udev/rules.d/69-probe-rs.rules
# and run `sudo udevadm control --reload-rules && sudo udevadm trigger`.
#
# https://probe.rs/docs/getting-started/probe-setup/#udev-rules

# 0d28:0204 — STMicroelectronics ST-LINK/V2
SUBSYSTEMS=="usb", ATTRS{idVendor}=="0483", ATTRS{idProduct}=="3748", MODE="0666", TAG+="uaccess"
# 0483:374b — STMicroelectronics ST-LINK/V2.1 (Nucleo)
SUBSYSTEMS=="usb", ATTRS{idVendor}=="0483", ATTRS{idProduct}=="374b", MODE="0666", TAG+="uaccess"
# 0483:374f — STMicroelectronics ST-LINK/V3
SUBSYSTEMS=="usb", ATTRS{idVendor}=="0483", ATTRS{idProduct}=="374f", MODE="0666", TAG+="uaccess"
# 1366:* — SEGGER J-Link family
SUBSYSTEMS=="usb", ATTRS{idVendor}=="1366", MODE="0666", TAG+="uaccess"
# 03eb:2157 — Atmel CMSIS-DAP
SUBSYSTEMS=="usb", ATTRS{idVendor}=="03eb", ATTRS{idProduct}=="2157", MODE="0666", TAG+="uaccess"
# 0d28:0204 — Daplink
SUBSYSTEMS=="usb", ATTRS{idVendor}=="0d28", ATTRS{idProduct}=="0204", MODE="0666", TAG+="uaccess"
# 2e8a:* — Raspberry Pi (picoprobe / Pico debug)
SUBSYSTEMS=="usb", ATTRS{idVendor}=="2e8a", MODE="0666", TAG+="uaccess"
# 1fc9:* — NXP LPC-Link
SUBSYSTEMS=="usb", ATTRS{idVendor}=="1fc9", MODE="0666", TAG+="uaccess"
